surface: Complete: 58/58 runtime exports plus the full TypeScript surface; the export surface is byte-identical to upstream in both directions (locked by test), and `@tanstack/query-core` is re-exported verbatim.
divergences: Suspense integrates via octane's `use(thenable)` rather than throwing a promise (observable behavior matches).
ssr: `HydrationBoundary` fully ported (incl. streaming `promise`/`dehydratedAt` re-hydration); the SSR/streaming server entries and server-render tests are still open.
